# aikido_zen_app_ip_blocklist (Resource)

Manages the custom IP blocklist for a Zen app in Aikido Security.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aikido_zen_app_ip_blocklist" "api" {
  app_id       = aikido_zen_app.api.id
  ip_addresses = ["198.51.100.1", "192.0.2.0/24", "203.0.113.0/24"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The ID of the Zen app.
- `ip_addresses` (Set of String) Set of IP addresses or CIDR blocks to block (e.g., `198.51.100.1`, `192.0.2.0/24`).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
